title: AssociationRoomProposal v1
description: Machine-readable schema for a deterministic bootstrap proposal of an opt-in association room.

proposal/id.description: Stable identifier of the room bootstrap proposal.

cluster/id.description: Correlation cluster identifier that justified the proposal.

proposal/node-id.description: Node that published the proposal artifact.

room/id.description: Identifier of the proposed association room or process.

room-policy/profile.description: Initial room policy profile for the next-stage space.

disclosure/profile.description: Disclosure posture to be applied before and during enrollment.

bootstrap/node-ids.description: Nodes that form the bootstrap witness or proposal set.

bootstrap/expires-at.description: Time after which the proposal must be reconsidered or discarded.

moderation/mode.description: Initial moderation or witness posture of the proposed room.

participants/min-opt-in-count.description: Minimum number of human opt-ins required before the room is considered active.
